Class OrganType

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.util.ExtensibleEnum
org.episteme.natural.biology.OrganType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExtensibleEnum>
public final class OrganType extends ExtensibleEnum
Extensible categorization of biological organs (e.g. Heart, Brain, Root, Leaf).
Since:
1.1
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

      public boolean isBuiltIn()
